factors: Single qualified alternate until the Vadodara plant restarts (est. 21 days)
Expedited air freight adds ~12% landed cost on the first 3,000 kg
Sea balance reaches Rotterdam on day 16 — inside Vela Sparkling's 18-day cover but with little slack

summary: Coverage gap closed for Trailpoint Granola Bar: confirmed 7-day expedited delivery beats the 9-day cover runway with 2 days of margin. Vela Sparkling Botanicals is covered by the sea balance arriving day 16 against 18 days of cover.
